DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE REVISED SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY THE MOVING PARTY SHOWS THAT THE DISPUTES AT ISSUE HAVE BEEN RESOLVED BY THE AMENDED RESPONSES. SANCTIONS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT OTIS ELEVATOR'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE REVISED SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY THE MOVING PARTY SHOWS THAT THE DISPUTES AT ISSUE HAVE BEEN RESOLVED BY THE AMENDED RESPONSES EXCEPT FORM INTERROGATORY 10.1. THE OBJECTION TO 10.1 IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT MAY FOLLOW UP VIA DEPOSITION DISCOVERY. SANCTIONS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

DEFENDANT OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Further Responses To Defendant's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Matter continued to October 16, 2023 at 9:00 am in Dept 301 before JPT McDonald. The record shows that amended responses were served. The Court directs the parties to meet and confer via phone or Zoom by September 22, 2023 regarding any deficiencies in the amended responses. If any issues remain outstanding, Defendants shall file (and email to JPT McDonald) a revised separate statement by October 3, 2023. Plaintiff shall file an opposing separate statement by October 10, 2023. No reply. The issue of sanctions is reserved to the next hearing date.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Not Present. Matter not reported. (JPT/302)
